title: forsythia suspensa var. fortunei
intro: Forsythia suspensa var. fortunei, also known as Weegei or Fortune's Forsythia, is a deciduous shrub native to China and used in traditional medicine. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties, which include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Forsythia suspensa var. fortunei is typically prepared for medicinal use through tea infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, although its safety and efficacy are not well-documented in Western medical literature.
